title: Alacrity
description: 32x resource pack with crazy attention to details
body: ![Alacrity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee87e25ed8c395e98c725e4264974df6740c8152.png) **About** This is where I put all my love for RPGs, Medieval, and Magic. I played Minecraft for a long time with different resource packs, until I decided to put together all the accumulated experience of what I like. The word Alacrity was chosen as my state of mind in which I was creating this pack. What's waiting for you here? - A full conversion of all textures in a new 32x resolution. Still recognizable but looks new - Crazy attention to detail - The spirit of magic and RPG games (I was inspired by Warcraft, Harry Potter, Gothic, The Elder Scrolls and many other universes) - Incredible vegetation - A **lot** of custom 3D models of blocks and mobs (CEM) - Huge amount of alternative block textures Browse some **Addons** **Support me on Boosty:** https://boosty.to/alacrity and get bonuses: - Early access to new versions - Early access to mod support - Other exclusive content **Special Thanks** - Toby Plowy aka **Toby109tt** for permission to use some of his textures from his resource pack EpicAdventures: www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/epic-adventures-by-toby109tt-x32/ - **VladimirVood** for allowing me to use his stunning drawings for some of the paintings: vladimirwood.artstation.com/ - **Astraica** for this awesome stylized Alacrity lettering, invaluable help in porting the GUI to 1.20.4 and textures for some of the mods **Terms of use** You can, using my resource pack: - Enjoy it. - Record videos, take pictures with your friends, and upload them to any resource you like (it's a good idea to leave a link to the source) You can't: - Re-hosting this resource pack to any other websites (it's ok if you place a link to my official download sources) - Use any part of this resource pack in other projects If in doubt, you can always reach me on Discord
